name: Note summarizer
shortDescription: Web application for summarizing notes using AI
description: Created a web application that leverages AI to summarize lengthy notes into concise, easy-to-read formats. The app supports multiple languages and includes features for saving, sharing, and exporting summaries.

name: Multiplayer Bluetooth Tic-Tac-Toe game
description: Led a team to create a Bluetooth-enabled Tic Tac Toe application using Android Jetpack Compose, exceeding requirements and achieving an exceptional score of 125/120. The app features a simple and intuitive UI, score tracking, and the ability to play multiple rounds.

name: Context Monitor
shortDescription: Heartbeat and respiration rate monitoring android app
description: Created an Android app that monitors and displays the user's heartbeat and respiration rate in real-time. The app uses the device's camera and sensors to provide accurate readings and includes features for tracking health metrics over time.

name: Basic language parser
shortDescription: Simple language parser for basic syntax
description: Developed a basic language parser that can interpret and execute simple commands in a custom scripting language. The parser supports variable assignments, arithmetic operations, and conditional statements.

name: CT Scanner 3D Reconstruction
shortDescription: 3D reconstruction program using CT Scanner data
description: Developed a program to reconstruct 3D objects from CT Scanner readings leveraging the MART (Multiplicative Algebraic Reconstruction Technique) algorithm. The software processes multiple 2D scans to create accurate 3D models of small objects.

name: Handwritten Character Recognition
description: Built and trained a 98% accurate Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) model to recognize Devanagari characters drawn in front of a webcam in real-time. The system processes video input, extracts the drawn characters, and classifies them with high accuracy.

name: Gesture Controlled Hologram Pong
shortDescription: Pong game with 3D hologram display and gesture controls
description: Created an innovative pong game using Unity, with OpenCV Python code to detect player hand gestures for control. Formed a 3D hologram display using an upside-down truncated acrylic square prism placed on an LED screen, creating an immersive gaming experience.
